title: Junior Business Development Manager at Indiabulls Real Estate

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Indiabulls Real Estate
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? Indiabulls Real Estate in Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Indiabulls Real Estate:
Indiabulls Real Estate is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indiabulls Real Estate!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
